question: Return a table of delivered average order value by age_group and payment_method, with columns age_group, payment_method, delivered_orders, and avg_delivered_order_value.
sql_query:
WITH order_values AS (
  SELECT o.order_id, c.age_group, p.payment_method, SUM(p.payment_value) AS order_total
  FROM core.orders o
  JOIN core.customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
  JOIN core.payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
  WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
  GROUP BY o.order_id, c.age_group, p.payment_method
)
SELECT age_group, payment_method, COUNT(*) AS delivered_orders, AVG(order_total) AS avg_delivered_order_value
FROM order_values
GROUP BY age_group, payment_method
ORDER BY age_group, payment_method
pandas_sql_query: WITH delivered_order_values AS (SELECT c.age_group, o.payment_method, o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price - oi.discount_amount) AS delivered_order_net_value FROM customers c JOIN orders o USING (customer_id) JOIN order_items oi USING (order_id) WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) SELECT age_group, payment_method, COUNT(*) AS delivered_orders, ROUND(AVG(delivered_order_net_value), 2) AS avg_delivered_order_value FROM delivered_order_values GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY age_group, avg_delivered_order_value DESC, payment_method
